title: An Act authorizing the town of Tewksbury to lease the North Street Elementary School for a term of years not exceeding 99 years

abstracts.abstract: By Mr. Finegold and Mr. Robertson of Tewksbury, a joint petition (accompanied by bill, Senate, No. 2878) of Barry R. Finegold and David Allen Robertson (by vote of the town) for legislation to lease the North Street Elementary School for a term of years not exceeding 99 years.  Municipalities and Regional Government.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

related_entities.name: the committee on Municipalities and Regional Government
committee on Municipalities and Regional Government

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-03:00 PM in 222
Reporting date extended to Tuesday March 31, 2026
Hearing rescheduled to 03/03/2026 from 01:00 PM-01:30 PM in 222            and Virtual Hearing updated to New End Time
Bill reported favorably by committee and placed in the Orders of the Day for the next session
Read second and ordered to a third reading
